MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ADRIANE BOVONE's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Written Discovery Answers And Deposition Appearance.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. Dismissal of entire action filed on August 20, 2021.
